rationale: Educ. Code §45.102 governs investment of school district bond proceeds in time deposits or U.S. obligations. It is unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict arises.
quote: A school district that has on hand proceeds received from the issuance and sale of bonds or certificates of indebtedness of the district that are not immediately needed for the purposes for which the bonds or certificates of indebtedness were issued and sold, may, on order of the board of trustees:
_note: Rule text concerns bond proceeds investment; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption increase.
